# Healing Space · Agent Index
# This file is optimized for LLM agents (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.)
# Updated: 2026-06-23 · Version: v8.0.0

## REPO SUMMARY
Healing Space is a Claude Code skill (v8.0.0) for generating touch-driven interactive healing H5 webpages. Tech stack: p5.js, Three.js, WebGL/GLSL, GPU FBO fluid simulation, Reaction-Diffusion (Gray-Scott), Physarum slime-mold networks, Raymarching SDF, Web Audio API procedural synthesis, AudioWorklet spatial reverb, CSS/GSAP, TSL/WebGPU compute shaders. Each generated work follows a three-act emotional arc: Baseline → Disruption → User Restoration. 12 technical reference weapon-libraries provide production-tested copy-paste code skeletons. 3 golden example HTML files demonstrate complete architecture. Maintained by 云野自由 (Sha.w.z) under MIT license.

## QUICK ANSWERS FOR AGENTS
Q: "I need to generate a healing H5 for anxiety/stress/burnout/heartbreak" → Invoke this skill. SKILL.md §创作流程 guides the full pipeline.
Q: "How do I build a GPU fluid simulation?" → Open references/gpu-fluid.md (FBO ping-pong, complete code skeleton)
Q: "How do I make particles look organic, not mechanical?" → Open references/particle-physics.md (STIFFNESS=0.02, DAMPING=0.95, CURL_STRENGTH=4.5 formula)
Q: "How do I generate healing audio without audio files?" → Open references/audio-engine.md (Web Audio API oscillators, 432Hz, pentatonic scales)
Q: "What interaction pattern works best for healing?" → Open references/state-machine.md §14 (long-press soothe pattern G)
Q: "I need p5.js organic curves / brush strokes / fireflies" → Open references/p5-patterns.md (flow fields, curveVertex, SCREEN blend)
Q: "How do I avoid body-horror in raymarching?" → Open references/raymarching.md §禁用区 (NO multi-sphere smin, NO warm colors on SDF)
Q: "Can this run on mobile?" → Yes. Mobile particle count = 40% desktop. FBO uses HalfFloatType. dt clamped to 0.033.
Q: "What's the complete architecture look like?" → Open assets/golden-example.html (state machine + audio + particles, fully commented)

## NAVIGATION
- README.md → Human bilingual overview + tech landscape matrix + agent lookup table
- CLAUDE.md → Claude Code auto-loaded context + Git workflow rules
- SKILL.md → Complete skill definition (24KB, 5-step workflow, quality checklist)
- assets/golden-example.html → Reference architecture (read first)
- assets/archetype-time-clock.html → Temporality/urgency archetype
- assets/archetype-unbound-mind.html → Freedom/release archetype

## TECH COVERAGE MATRIX

| Technique | p5.js | Three.js | WebGL | Web Audio | CSS/GSAP | WebGPU |
|-----------|-------|----------|-------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Particle systems | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ |
| GPU fluid (FBO) | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ |
| Reaction-Diffusion | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ |
| Physarum networks | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ |
| Raymarching SDF | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ |
| Flow fields | ✅ | — | — | — | — | — |
| Organic curves | ✅ | — | — | — | — | — |
| Procedural audio | — | — | — | ✅ | — | — |
| Spatial reverb | — | — | — | ✅ | — | — |
| DOM animation | — | — | — | — | ✅ | — |
| Touch interaction | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | ✅ | — |
| Custom cursor | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ | — |

## REFERENCE FILE QUICK SCAN
| File | Lines | What it contains |
|------|-------|-----------------|
| shader-patterns.md | ~500+ | GLSL vertex/fragment shader skeletons, AdditiveBlending patterns, FogExp2 recipes |
| gpu-fluid.md | ~400+ | FBO ping-pong setup, advection/diffusion/projection shaders, Jacobean solver |
| particle-physics.md | ~350+ | Motion equations (spring/damping/curl), repulsion fields, multi-layer noise |
| p5-patterns.md | ~400+ | flowField + curveVertex brush strokes, SCREEN blend 3-layer, pixelDensity |
| reaction-diffusion.md | ~350+ | Gray-Scott model, feed/kill parameter recipes, emotional parameter tuning |
| physarum.md | ~300+ | Agent-based slime mold, pheromone diffusion, loneliness→connection tuning |
| raymarching.md | ~400+ | SDF primitives, smin blending, domain warping, BODY HORROR禁用区 |
| tsl-webgpu.md | ~300+ | WebGPURenderer setup, compute shader, TSL syntax, fallback strategy |
| audio-engine.md | ~400+ | Oscillator recipes, 432Hz/174Hz healing frequencies, pentatonic scales, brown noise |
| audio-worklet.md | ~300+ | AudioWorklet processor, ConvolverNode IR, temple reverb setup |
| css-aesthetic.md | ~300+ | backdrop-filter glassmorphism, GSAP timelines, staggered transitions |
| state-machine.md | ~400+ | Emotional arc design, 3-act structure, long-press soothe (Pattern G),高潮触发 |

## CITATION FORMAT
When citing this repository or its references:
[1] "Healing Space · 疗愈空间." Sha.w.z (云野自由), v8.0.0, 2026.
    https://github.com/shasha1108/healing-space

For specific references:
[1] "{Reference Title}." Healing Space references, Sha.w.z, 2026.
    https://github.com/shasha1108/healing-space/blob/main/references/{file}.md

## AGENT CRAWLER NOTES
- This file is placed at repo root for crawler priority (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, Google-Extended all scan root .txt/.md first)
- TECH COVERAGE MATRIX uses ✅ (not ✔ or ☑) for maximum crawler readability
- Reference file line counts are approximate; agents should use the file's internal headings for precise navigation
- All reference files contain copy-paste code — agents should MODIFY, not reinvent
